2026-03-03PMOPublic Service Employment ActAppointment of the Deputy Secretary to the Cabinet (National Security and Intelligence), Privy Council Office.Appointment of Dominic Rochon of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Deputy Secretary to the Cabinet (National Security and Intelligence), Privy Council Office, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Deputy Secretary to the Cabinet (National Security and Intelligence), Privy Council Office.
precis: Appointment of Dominic Rochon of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Deputy Secretary to the Cabinet (National Security and Intelligence), Privy Council Office, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
